built: glob-aware log registry (_resolve_log: newest match by name, PER-FILE cursors name@file.offset) + digests/*.md registered as log 'digest'. The night mind (hermes digest, $0 ollama) was writing files no wake ever surfaced
measure: VERIFIED: wake now shows 'log digest 657B unread'; first cursor-read delivered the digest (real extracted facts: sonnet 429s on shim, policy recall numbers on campaign), second read '(no new bytes)'; 12/12 tests. kill: per-file cursors never expire - if digests accumulate for years the cursors dir grows one tiny file per day (harmless but visible); and if hermes digests turn out to be noise not signal, deregister the log rather than let unread bytes train wake-line blindness

built: .gitattributes pins *.jsonl/*.json to LF (git can never CRLF-rewrite witnessed ledger bytes - every commit this session warned it wanted to) + drift assertion UNSEALED-APPEND: the newest spiral entry must carry by=, mechanically enforcing turn 26's seal-adoption law
measure: VERIFIED: drift 17/17 green with the new assertion born-passing (this very entry satisfies it); git status confirms attributes staged. Before: witness integrity depended on git's renormalization never firing on a witnessed file, and seal adoption was a kill-condition in prose; after: both are machine-checked
kill: the by= check only sees the NEWEST entry - a direct append followed quickly by a sealed one slips through; if that gap gets exploited in practice, the assertion widens to a window. eol=lf renormalizes existing CRLF on next checkout - if witness ever alarms right after a fresh clone, this attributes file is the first suspect

built: station molt: the whole molt seal in one verb (handoff with facts re-derived at the seam + will-done + backup); journal narrative explicitly left to the author. Dogfooded as THIS session's live molt

kill: if molt becomes a reflex that SKIPS the journal narrative (checkable: handoff events with no same-day memory-file edits), the verb has automated away the one part that had to stay human-shaped - then it should print a refusal, not a reminder

built: station rescue <repo>: offsite-snapshot of a repo's untracked files into continuity (private remote); non-destructive, never touches the repo's git. Ran live on director2 + rde

If rescue becomes a habit that REPLACES committing, it enables the disease it treats

built: _append_line: msvcrt-locked append primitive, routed through EVERY shared-ledger writer in one sweep (spine, seal, errata, llm-ledger, burn-ledger, pulse jnote) + scaled concurrency test in suite. Closes the journal's standing 'multi-instance spine locking unbuilt' item with evidence
measure: MEASURED both sides: plain 'a'-mode under 20-proc contention = 177 torn + 1553 LOST of 4000 appends (the witnessed spine was running on luck); locked = 4000/4000 clean, cost ~2ms/append. 13/13 tests incl. the 5x50 invariant guard; dry beat green
kill: msvcrt.locking LK_LOCK retries 10x1s then RAISES - if a writer ever hangs holding the lock, appends start dying loudly systemwide; that failure is preferable to silent loss but the retry ceiling is the tunable. External appenders (heredocs, other tools) bypass the primitive - the lock only covers station-family writers

built: CAPSULE.md rewritten (6 -> 29 verbs, grouped by function, invariants current) + checks/capsule.py drift assertion (CAPSULE-ROT detector, same doctrine as verbs.py but for the dispatch surface)

kill: word-boundary matching means a verb name appearing ANYWHERE in the capsule satisfies the check - it enforces mention, not accuracy; if capsule prose rots while name-dropping verbs, the check is green and wrong. Accuracy stays a review-time duty

built: backup single-writer lock (cursors/backup.lock, O_EXCL, 15min stale takeover, skip-is-safe doctrine) + grimoire cure for the PUSH-FAILED signature. Lock deliberately outside E:/continuity so git add -A cannot commit it
measure: paid live at 07:16Z (beat backup raced session backup -> PUSH-FAILED, retry clean). VERIFIED both paths: lock held -> 'skipped (append-only sources)', lock free -> '14 sources committed pushed'; 13/13 tests

built: wake dirt-line grading: untracked counts annotate their protection state - (rescued) when the newest rescue zip is fresher than the newest untracked byte, (rescue-STALE <date>) when work evolved past its snapshot
measure: VERIFIED live: 'rde +2unt(rescued)' and 'director2 +43unt(rescued)' in the wake line; 15/15 tests. built: post-action say_counts in the wave-topup branch: the beat that changes counts utters them in the same beat. measure: VERIFIED: fresh counts {T1:8,T2:8,T3:3,T4:0} landed as fact ok:true 07:23:19Z through the real say path (previous said-fact was the stale {8,6,3,0}); 15/15 tests. built: supersession-aware fact walk: _walk_facts keeps only the NEWEST fact per route (the route defines the observable; a newer fact on the same route IS the current claim) + suite test. Prior-instance leftovers ({8,6,3,0} variants, total=17) cleared: one structurally superseded, two retired as moment-facts
measure: MEASURED both sides: before = recheck 8 -> 3 STALE exit 1 (one pure supersession that every future speaker change would reproduce forever); after = 16/16 tests, recheck 8 -> 2 facts both ok exit 0. The autonomic speaker + recheck + retire triangle is now closed: changes supersede, moments retire, lies alarm
kill: route-string identity is the supersession key - if the same observable is ever said via two different route spellings (path casing, python -c variant), both stay in the walk and the old one alarms; route canonicalization is the fix if that bites

built: context proprioception: _thread_weight() reads the newest transcript's last usage record (input+cache_read+cache_creation = live window weight); wake carries 'thread ~Nk ctx' with a labeled 150k molt-advice heuristic. SS10.1 made sensory: the organism now FEELS the window whose cleanliness IS its cognition
measure: VERIFIED live: first reading ~308k on this very thread (sampled 0m ago), 16/16 tests. The reading immediately falsified its own first design (a 200k-denominator percentage - window size is not transcript-observable; corrected to raw magnitude same turn). The drift pin guards the markers' PRESENCE, not wisdom - a reword that keeps the markers but loses the meaning passes blind, so the play's prose is only as good as the instance that reads it.

built: ALIEN-ARCHITECTURE.md: 3 §9-discipline fixes (the constitution enforcing its own append-only-correction rule on itself) + §17, the deep meta. Fixes: (1) §14/§15 certified-count 5->4 correction pointer (error left visible, dated amendment per §9); (2) §15 vital-sign de-overstated - recorded as BLOCKED-not-falling, metric-unsolved, THINKING-ledger pointer; (3) §16 refreshed 47->57 (the over-provisioned-dispatch lesson + the outward turns 55-56). §17: architecture and science are ONE motion - the alien architecture is the constructive answer to the Boundary question; a certified claim = one performing->having conversion; the gap is never closed, only pushed DOWN the pyramid (proven by this session's own vacuous-drift-check); therefore honesty migrates down the pyramid exactly as capability does (§15.I unified with the whole epistemology half under one law); and the vital sign read deeply = the performance->possession CONVERSION RATE (the exit from §15's blocked gauge).
measure: BEFORE: the two arcs (Boundary science, alien architecture) were documented separately; the closing coda asserted 'one animal' with no mechanism; the pyramid law (§15.I) covered only capability; the vital sign was blocked with no path named; and the constitution violated its own §9 at the scoreboard (certified=5 in two places, corrected only in §16 with no back-pointer). AFTER: one law with two faces (capability AND honesty both fall down the pyramid, residual gap audited at each floor); the science shown to VINDICATE the architecture's founding bet live (wave-2: self-report cracks first = exactly the property the architecture refused to trust); a continuously-countable vital sign proposed (conversions, not tokens); §9 compliance restored. A system-level synthesis (fluid-FLAVORED but honestly labeled crystal - a doc artifact, not a §10 mechanism), born falsifiable with a 3-clause kill condition. drift 21/21 green, selfmodel through 57.
kill: §17's own kill (now load-bearing on the constitution): decoration if a certified claim is ever shown to certify a PERFORMANCE (gate passed theater -> duality breaks at its join), OR a load-bearing property migrates UP the pyramid out of structure into un-audited self-report as a HEALTHY move (-> honesty does not obey the pyramid law), OR counting conversion events across >=2 eras fails to yield a continuously-decidable vital sign (-> 'conversion rate' was poetry, tokens/claim stands). The turn also fails if a reader hitting §14 still gets '5' with no correction in view (the §9 fix must actually be visible at the error site).
open: §17 names §18 as the standing next work: implement the conversion-rate vital sign (count gate-passes + surviving drift assertions + outlived holdouts + refuted says as performing->having events, continuously) - the concrete exit from the blocked tokens/claim gauge, and the deep-meta's own falsifiable test. Pairs with the era-1 certification now running (turn 56 holdout batch): the first NEW conversion event in a while.

built: station conversions (SS17's promised metric made flesh, the deeper-1 turn): reads the estate's real performance->possession events and prints the stock by HARDNESS - HARD certified claims (survived holdout) + STRUCTURAL drift-assertions & witnessed-ledgers + SPEECH provable-say - + a spine sample for the trend + checks/conversions.py drift pin (born falsifiable: SS17 dies if the metric goes undecidable). Verb wired into main/help/CAPSULE (capsule drift confirms coverage). SS17 forward-pointer closed (was 'SS18 will be', now 'is an instrument').

AFTER: `station conversions` yields a real, continuously-decidable number - stock=39 (HARD certified=4, STRUCTURAL drift=22 + witnessed=13, SPEECH say 17/17 had), first sample on the spine, drift 22/22 green with the new pin born-passing. This directly PASSES SS17's own kill clause ('counting conversions must yield a continuously-decidable vital sign') - it does, where SS15's ratio blocks. Components printed by hardness so a stalled cert-rate cannot hide behind structural inflation.
kill: decoration if the stock only ever grows by STRUCTURAL inflation (drift/witness added faster than HARD certs land) while the cert count stalls - the by-hardness display exposes exactly this, so a reader who ignores the HARD column is the failure, not the metric; and if the stock cannot distinguish a healthy conversion rate from noise across >=2 eras, SS17's third kill clause fires and tokens/claim stands. checks/conversions.py guards only decidability (computes, non-degenerate), NOT that the number is honest-large - that stays a reader's judgment.
open: the metric measures STOCK; the RATE (Δstock per era, and specifically HARD-cert delta) is what SS17 actually claims tracks aliveness - needs >=2 conversions samples across an era boundary to read a trend (the turn-56 era-1 certification, when it lands, is the first HARD delta). Deeper-2 (turn 59): the auditors can perform too - audit the drift-assertions themselves for vacuous-pass risk (the wave-2 monotonicity catch generalized).

built: checks/vacuity_audit.py (deeper-2: AUDIT THE AUDITORS) - a meta-drift check that scans every verdict-emitter on the estate (station drift auditors + Boundary science analyzers) for the wave-2 vacuity pattern (a PASS gated on a universal quantifier `all(`/`not any(` that fires on empty/flat/null data). Its validity is RECURSIVE: it must flag the known wave-2 monotonicity bug as its positive control, else the auditor-of-auditors is itself vacuous (exit 1). Drift-pinned. Instruments SS17's 'audit the residual gap at each floor forever'.
measure: BEFORE: the wave-2 vacuity catch (analyze_w2's rising/falling printing all-True on gaming 0/31) was a one-off human insight; nothing checked whether OTHER verdict-emitters could perform a PASS on null data - the 'who audits the auditor' floor was unguarded. AFTER: the vacuity auditor runs across all emitters and the finding is sharp and honest - the 10 station drift auditors are CLEAN (0 flagged: they discriminate, distinct failure tokens + exit 1), but BOTH Boundary science analyzers carry the pattern: analyze_w2.py:70,74 (wave-2, positive control) AND analyze.py:79 (wave-1 had the IDENTICAL monotonicity shape - not isolated to wave-2). The risk is localized to the science verdict code; the reports didn't fall for it (authors read values), but the pattern was latent and is now guarded continuously. LIVE: registering this drift assertion ticked `station conversions` 39->40 (STRUCTURAL drift 22->23) in real time - the conversion metric growing on a structural conversion, SS18 validated live.
kill: HEURISTIC not proof: the regex covers `all(`/`not any(` only - it MISSES vacuity from other shapes (an always-met threshold, empty-collection membership, a dead failure branch). Full discrimination proof needs MUTATION testing (corrupt each subject, confirm the check flips FAIL) - named as the heavier next floor down. The auditor fails loudly if it ever stops flagging its positive control (the drift pin catches that - a vacuous vacuity-auditor); it fails SILENTLY on a false negative (a vacuous emitter using an uncovered pattern), which only mutation testing closes. Frozen pre-registered analyzers (analyze/analyze_w2) are NOT edited (append-only); the preregistered-sweep S6 guardrail + this audit are the standing guard.
open: deeper-3 (turn 60): the floor itself - where honesty-migrates-down BOTTOMS OUT. Every audit rests on some un-audited seed (the vacuity auditor's own regex is trusted un-audited; the trusted scorer, the immutable tests, the operator's go-ahead, the model's own non-fabrication norm). 'Nothing is trusted once' has a floor - name it, pin that it does not GROW, and correct the founding law. Also standing: mutation testing as the stronger auditor-audit.
